articles.title: OpenAI reveals its first AI processor: Jalapeño
articles.subtitle: OpenAI has just revealed a new "intelligence processor" chip for AI servers made in partnership with Broadcom. The chip, called Jalapeño, is designed to power current and future large language models, according to an announcement on Wednesd
articles.author: Emma Roth
articles.summary: OpenAI has just revealed a new "intelligence processor" chip for AI servers made in partnership with Broadcom. The chip, called Jalapeño, is designed to power current and future large language models, according to an announcement on Wednesday. Jalapeño is an ASIC (Application-Specific Integrated Circuit), meaning it's designed for a specific purpose: AI inference. With AI […]
body: OpenAI’s first custom chip is made for the servers processing ChatGPT requests.

OpenAI has just revealed a new “intelligence processor” chip for AI servers made in partnership with Broadcom. The chip, called Jalapeño, is designed to power current and future large language models, according to an announcement on Wednesday.

Jalapeño is an ASIC (Application-Specific Integrated Circuit), meaning it’s designed for a specific purpose: AI inference. With AI inference, models process a user’s request to run an agent like Codex or offer a response from ChatGPT, while AI training involves a model consuming vast amounts of data to inform its responses.

It comes just nine months after OpenAI revealed that it would team up with Broadcom to make its own chips, helping reduce the company’s reliance on the GPUs offered by Nvidia that are in limited supply. In an interview with Reuters , Broadcom CEO Hock Tan says it matches the performance of Nvidia’s Blackwell chips and Google’s Tensor processing units. Microsoft , Meta , and Amazon are among the other AI companies that have also launched custom-designed AI chips recently to power their servers for either training or inference, while still trailing Nvidia’s chips on overall performance.

OpenAI calls Jalapeño the “first step in a multi-generation compute platform,” which it expects to deploy by the end of 2026. “While OpenAI is still measuring final performance, early testing shows that Jalapeño will deliver performance per watt substantially better than current state-of-the-art,” OpenAI says.
keyPoints: OpenAI’s first custom chip is made for the servers processing ChatGPT requests.

OpenAI has just revealed a new “intelligence processor” chip for AI servers made in partnership with Broadcom. The chip, called Jalapeño, is designed to power current and future large language models, according to an announcement on Wednesday.

Jalapeño is an ASIC (Application-Specific Integrated Circuit), meaning it’s designed for a specific purpose: AI inference. With AI inference, models process a user’s request to run an agent like Codex or offer a response from ChatGPT, while AI training involves a model consuming vast amounts of data to inform its responses.
paragraphTranslations: OpenAI的第一个定制芯片是为处理ChatGPT请求的服务器制造的。
OpenAI刚刚与Broadcom合作推出了一款新的“AI服务器智能处理器”芯片。根据周三的公告，这款名为Jalapeño的芯片旨在为当前和未来的大型语言模型提供动力。
Jalapeño是一款ASIC（特定应用集成电路），意味着它是为了特定目的而设计的：AI推理。在AI推理中，模型处理用户的请求以运行Codex等代理或提供ChatGPT的响应，而AI训练涉及模型消耗大量数据以指导其响应。

这是在OpenAI透露将与Broadcom合作制造自己的芯片的九个月后，这有助于减少公司对Nvidia提供的供应有限的GPU的依赖。在接受路透社采访时，Broadcom首席执行官Hock Tan表示，它与Nvidia的Blackwell芯片和谷歌的Tensor处理单元的性能相匹配。微软、Meta和亚马逊是最近也推出了定制设计的AI芯片的其他AI公司，以驱动他们的服务器进行训练或推理，同时在整体性能上仍然落后于Nvidia的芯片。
OpenAI称Jalapeño为“多代计算平台的第一步”，预计到2026年底部署。“尽管OpenAI仍在测量最终性能，但早期测试显示，Jalapeño将在每瓦性能上大大优于当前的最先进技术，”OpenAI表示。

paragraphs: OpenAI has unveiled its first custom-designed chip, Jalapeño, in collaboration with Broadcom. This AI processor is an ASIC, specifically designed for AI inference, which is the process of models responding to user requests. OpenAI aims to reduce its reliance on Nvidia’s GPUs, which are in limited supply. Jalapeño is expected to match the performance of Nvidia’s Blackwell chips and Google’s Tensor processing units. OpenAI sees Jalapeño as the first step in a multi-generation compute platform, anticipating deployment by the end of 2026. Early tests indicate that Jalapeño will provide substantially better performance per watt than current state-of-the-art technology.
paragraphTranslations: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 合作推出了其首款定制芯片，Jalapeño。这款人工智能处理器是一款 ASIC，专为人工智能推理设计，即模型响应用户请求的过程。OpenAI 旨在减少对 Nvidia 的 GPU 的依赖，这些 GPU 供应有限。Jalapeño 预计将与 Nvidia 的 Blackwell 芯片和谷歌的 Tensor 处理单元的性能相匹配。OpenAI 将 Jalapeño 视为多代计算平台的第一步，预计到 2026 年底部署。早期测试表明，Jalapeño 将比当前最先进的技术提供更好的每瓦性能。

articles.title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
articles.subtitle: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling, Lucas Ropek
articles.summary: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.
body: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now.
Founder Summit ticket savings of up to $190 end June 26. Join 1,000+ founders and VCs for all-day bootcamp. REGISTER NOW.

Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, according to Bloomberg . Per the report, Adler and Pritzel played key roles in the development of Google’s Gemini model.

These departures are part of a concerning trend for Google. Last week, legendary AI researcher Noam Shazeer announced that he was leaving Google for OpenAI. Shazeer had been at Google since 2000, save for the three years he spent building his controversial chatbot startup, Character.AI (which Google effectively acqui-hired for $2.7 billion, in part to bring Shazeer back to work on Gemini).

Just days after Shazeer made his announcement, Google DeepMind director John Jumper said he was leaving Google for Anthropic. Alongside DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis, Jumper won the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for his work on AlphaFold, which can predict 3D protein structures from animo acid sequences.
As OpenAI and Anthropic prepare to go public , this trend could continue — it’s a great time for the companies to recruit top AI talent with a promise of equity.

Last chance to save up to $190 on TechCrunch Founder Summit. Join 1,000+ founders and VCs at all stages for real-world scaling insights and connections that move the needle. Savings end June 26, 11:59 p.m. PT .

Founder Summit ticket savings of up to $190 end June 26. Join 1,000+ founders and VCs for all-day bootcamp. REGISTER NOW.

Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, according to Bloomberg . Per the report, Adler and Pritzel played key roles in the development of Google’s Gemini model.
paragraphTranslations: 2026年的首期StrictlyVC将于4月30日登陆旧金山。门票正在快速售罄。立即注册。
创始人峰会门票优惠高达190美元，优惠截止6月26日。加入1000多位创始人和风险资本家，参加全天训练营。立即注册。
据彭博社报道，顶尖AI研究员Jonas Adler和Alexander Pritzel将离开谷歌加入Anthropic。根据报道，Adler和Pritzel在谷歌的Gemini模型开发中扮演了关键角色。
这些离职是谷歌令人担忧的趋势的一部分。上周，传奇AI研究员Noam Shazeer宣布他将离开谷歌加入OpenAI。Shazeer自2000年以来一直在谷歌，除了他花费三年时间构建他备受争议的聊天机器人初创公司Character.AI（谷歌实际上以27亿美元的价格收购了这家公司，部分原因是为了将Shazeer带回谷歌继续从事Gemini项目）。
Shazeer宣布后仅几天，谷歌DeepMind总监John Jumper表示他将离开谷歌加入Anthropic。与DeepMind首席执行官Demis Hassabis一起，Jumper因其在AlphaFold上的工作——能够从氨基酸序列预测3D蛋白质结构——而获得了2024年诺贝尔化学奖。
随着OpenAI和Anthropic准备上市，这一趋势可能会持续——对于这些公司来说，这是一个以股权承诺招募顶尖AI人才的好时机。
节省高达190美元的TechCrunch创始人峰会的最后机会。加入1000多位处于各个阶段的创始人和风险资本家，获取现实世界的扩展洞察和推动进展的联系。优惠截止6月26日，太平洋时间晚上11:59。

paragraphs: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google to join Anthropic, a rival AI company. This follows the departure of AI expert Noam Shazeer, who left Google for OpenAI last week. Shazeer had been with Google since 2000, except for a three-year break to build his chatbot startup, Character.AI, which Google later acquired for $2.7 billion. Google DeepMind's director, John Jumper, also recently left for Anthropic after winning the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for his work on protein structure prediction with AlphaFold. As OpenAI and Anthropic prepare for public listings, they are actively recruiting top AI talent with the promise of equity.
paragraphTranslations: 顶尖人工智能研究者乔纳斯·阿德勒和亚历山大·普里策尔离开谷歌，加入了竞争对手人工智能公司Anthropic。此前，人工智能专家诺姆·沙泽尔上周离开谷歌加入了OpenAI。沙泽尔自2000年以来一直在谷歌工作，除了三年的休假时间用来创建他的聊天机器人初创公司Character.AI，后来谷歌以27亿美元的价格收购了这家公司。谷歌DeepMind的主管约翰·贾珀也在获得2024年诺贝尔化学奖后不久离开谷歌加入了Anthropic，他与DeepMind的首席执行官德米斯·哈萨比斯一起，因预测蛋白质结构的AlphaFold工作而获奖。随着OpenAI和Anthropic准备上市，他们正在积极招募顶尖的人工智能人才，并承诺给予股权。
